prompt: Create a wide 16:9 anime-style illustration of a stressed young woman in a small bedroom workspace, sitting at a wooden desk and staring in horror at an open laptop. The character is an anonymous young Japanese creator, with messy shoulder-length black hair and bangs, pale skin, huge round shocked eyes, sweat drops on both cheeks, a trembling open mouth, and a blue-purple shadow of despair across her forehead; she wears an oversized black hoodie and sits slumped in a black office chair. The laptop is angled toward the viewer on the right side of the desk, with large bold Japanese text on the white screen reading 審査ダメでした. Add one speech bubble beside her head containing マジか…, one black scribble frustration cloud above the laptop, and vertical manga stress lines descending from the top-left background. The room should feel like a creator’s bedroom: a gray mug with a black cat face on the left of the desk, a spiral notebook and black pen on the right with small handwritten notes, a simple bed with blue-gray bedding in the back right, shelves with books, binders, a potted plant, and a black cat plush. Include exactly 4 visible Japanese text areas: the laptop rejection message, the speech bubble, a motivational wall note on the left reading 夢は あきらめなければ 叶う…! with a small cat doodle, and small notebook notes about work categories. Use clean modern anime line art, muted gray-beige indoor colors, soft shading, comedic despair expression, detailed laptop keyboard, slight depth perspective, and a polished web-article illustration look.
